title: Registration Page with In-Game Name & Player ID fields, wired to Join Now button

requirements.summary: Update the RegistrationPage at '/registration' to include exactly two required input fields — 'In-Game Name' and 'Player ID' — along with a 'Proceed to Payment' button. The page must read match context from sessionStorage and display match details at the top. All styling must follow the existing dark neon-red gaming theme with back-navigation to Home.
acceptanceCriteria: The '/registration' route renders the RegistrationPage component with 'In-Game Name' and 'Player ID' input fields.
Both fields are required — the 'Proceed to Payment' button is disabled or shows a validation error if either field is empty.
Match context (game mode, entry fee, prize pool) read from sessionStorage is displayed on the page.
Page uses the existing dark neon-red theme with Orbitron/Rajdhani fonts and neon glow on the button.
A back navigation link/button returns the user to the Home screen ('/').

file_operations.description: Remove the 'WhatsApp Number' field from the form. Ensure the form contains exactly two required input fields: 'In-Game Name' and 'Player ID'. Add match context display at the top of the form showing game mode, entry fee, and prize pool read from sessionStorage. Ensure the 'Proceed to Payment' button is disabled when either field is empty. Add a back navigation button/link that navigates to '/' using TanStack Router. Verify all styling (dark card background, neon red accents, Orbitron/Rajdhani fonts, neon glow on button) aligns with the existing theme in frontend/src/index.css and frontend/tailwind.config.js.
Update the RegistrationData interface to remove the whatsappNumber field, keeping only inGameName and playerId as required fields. This ensures type consistency across the registration flow.

requirements.summary: Ensure that clicking the 'Join Now' button on any MatchCard (both live backend cards and the 3 static fallback cards in MatchList) stores the match's game mode, entry fee, and prize pool in sessionStorage and navigates to '/registration'. This must work consistently for all cards regardless of data source.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking 'Join Now' on any live backend match card saves match context to sessionStorage and navigates to '/registration'.
Clicking 'Join Now' on any of the 3 static fallback cards (Bermuda Solo, Bermuda Duo, Purgatory Solo) also saves match context to sessionStorage and navigates to '/registration'.
After navigation, the RegistrationPage correctly reads and displays the match context stored in sessionStorage.

file_operations.description: Verify that the existing 'Join Now' button click handler stores the match's gameMode, entryFee, and prizePool in sessionStorage (using a consistent key such as 'matchContext') before navigating to '/registration' via TanStack Router. Ensure this logic works for all MatchCard instances regardless of whether the match data comes from the backend or from static fallback data. The file summary indicates this functionality may already exist; confirm it meets all acceptance criteria or add/adjust as needed.

Verify that the 3 static fallback match cards (Bermuda Solo, Bermuda Duo, Purgatory Solo) each pass complete match data (gameMode, entryFee, prizePool) to the MatchCard component so that clicking 'Join Now' on any static card successfully stores match context in sessionStorage and navigates to '/registration'. Ensure consistency with live backend match cards.
